label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the church is
rationale: Primary entity name field at top of body.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The corporation is an independent local church located in ___, Maine.
rationale: City or town in Maine where the church is located. Implicitly Maine ('___, Maine.' is the form text).

label_verbatim: THIRD: The number of trustees is ___
rationale: Numeric count of trustees governing the church.

label_verbatim: and their names are ___ (continuation line 1 of THIRD recital)
rationale: First line of the THIRD recital naming the trustees inline. Distinct from the structured per-trustee block on page 1 — this is a free-text recital that lists the trustees in prose, while page 1 captures structured per-trustee identity+address. Both must be populated.
Second line of the same inline recital — overflow when names don't fit on line 1.
Third line of the inline recital — overflow line.
Date the certificate is signed. Single Dated field shared across all officer/trustee signers.
